channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: AI: The difference between augmenting and transforming your business
item.description: Is your company's current AI approach a strategic advantage or a chaotic, unmanaged liability?

item.title: Billie Eilish Doesn't Know if There Will Ever Be Another Billie Eilish
item.description: In an interview with WIRED ahead of her new concert film Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D), Billie Eilish talked about whether or not future artists will be able to leverage SoundCloud the way she did.

item.title: 'Taylor Sheridan's got his hands all over this show': Dutton Ranch stars on 'ups and downs' of filming Yellowstone spinoff as showrunner Chad Feehan exits show weeks before Paramount+ release date
item.description: Dutton Ranch hasn't even aired yet, but showrunner Chad Feehan has exited from the show. Thankfully, its lead stars have confirmed that Taylor Sheridan has still been heavily involved.

item.title: Amazon Ads lets advertisers use your LinkedIn data to send taregetd ads on TVs and streaming platforms
item.description: Precise LinkedIn targeting via job title, industry and more is coming to B2B marketers within Amazon DSP.

item.title: Cette image à couper le souffle du télescope James-Webb montre une galaxie au cœur presque aveuglant
item.description: Le télescope James-Webb a pris une image impressionnante d'une galaxie relativement proche de nous, Messier 77. Les détails de la photo montrent l'énorme quantité de poussière cosmique, mais aussi un cœur extrêmement brillant.

item.title: PcComponentes, la référence tech du e-commerce Européen depuis 20 ans [Sponso]
item.description: Expert de la vente de matériel tech depuis 20 ans, PcComponentes propose le meilleur de la technologie avec un service client 5 étoiles. Profitez de leurs offres anniversaires pour équiper votre maison au meilleur prix entre garanties solides, conseils d'experts et sélection de produits neufs ou reconditionnés.

item.title: This Keeper deal will save you 50% off Personal and Family plans and 30% off Business Starter plans
item.description: Now is the best time to pick of a discount on Keeper's Personal, Family, and Business Starter plans.

item.title: Before you buy that MacBook Neo — consider you might be able to get a super-cheap MacBook Air instead
item.description: The Neo is fantastic, but consider this particular MacBook Air deal at Best Buy before you commit to the cheaper model.

item.title: Cyberattaque chez France Titres : une association demande 150 000 € à l’État pour indemniser les victimes
item.description: Suite à la cyberattaque massive subie par l’ANTS, une association a saisi la CNIL et adressé deux demandes préalables d'indemnisation à l'État, réclamant 150 000 euros en réparation des préjudices subis.

item.title: The New Wild West of AI Kids’ Toys
item.description: These cuddly, connected companions could disrupt everything from make-believe to bedtime stories. No wonder some lawmakers want them banned.

item.title: The Batman Part II director reveals first behind-the-scenes look at the long-awaited DC comic book movie — and fans are convinced it teases who its main villain is
item.description: DC fans turn detective as The Batman Part II's first image renews hopes over a specific villain's appearance.

item.title: J’ai essayé le Geely E5, la première voiture électrique du géant chinois vendue en France
item.description: L'année 2026 est riche en nouveautés, surtout en nouvelles marques arrivant en France. Le chinois Geely veut aussi sa part du gâteau et arrive avec deux nouveaux modèles, le Starray EM-i hybride rechargeable et le Geely E5 100 % électrique. J'ai pu essayer ce dernier lors de sa première apparition en Europe.

item.title: How much is your digital identity worth? NordVPN's new tool reveals the true price of identity theft
item.description: NordVPN has launched a calculator that helps you work out how much your digital footprint costs on the dark web

item.title: 'The climate costs are insane': Why Chrome users are outraged over a forced 4GB Gemini AI update that may affect billions worldwide without their consent — and it even redownloads automatically when deleted
item.description: Google Chrome quietly downloaded a 4GB Gemini AI model onto devices, triggering backlash over consent, bandwidth, and environmental costs.

item.title: Balancing control and innovation for mission-critical communications
item.description: When faced with major outages or systemic failures, enterprises become dependent on external providers to restore essential services – or to keep them up and running in the first place.

item.title: Own a Google Pixel phone? Android 17 might finally let you remove the home screen search bar
item.description: Google might soon let you more freely customize your Pixel's home screen, and there's also a bug-fixing update being rolled out.

item.title: The Best Cat Water Fountains of 2026: Petlibro, Petkit, Oneisall
item.description: Ensuring your cat stays hydrated is one of the best ways to keep your pet healthy. The right pet water fountain can help.

item.title: AirPods avec caméras intégrées : Apple serait en phase finale de tests, mais le lancement dépend encore de Siri
item.description: Apple serait entré en phase finale de tests pour des AirPods équipés de caméras, son premier objet conçu pour l'ère de l'IA. Le matériel est presque prêt : c'est Siri qui retient tout le monde à quai.

item.title: Il a rebattu les cartes des robots aspirateurs avec sa brosse pression : le Deebot T80 Omni est maintenant en forte promotion
item.description: L'Ecovacs Deebot T80 Omni est un aspirateur robot laveur doté d'une brosse Osmoroller inédite que vous retrouvez en promo à 499 euros au lieu de 1 099 euros à sa sortie.

item.title: '2026 is the year CEOs must rewire the C-suite': IBM study reveals what successful leaders are actually doing with AI work in their businesses
item.description: To succeed in an AI-first world, companies need to install AI-first leaders and middle managers before upskilling workers.

item.title: Sony’s PS5 sales plummet amid price rises and a memory crisis
item.description: Sony sold just 1.5 million PS5 consoles in its most recent fourth fiscal quarter, down 46 percent year over year. The slump in PS5 sales comes after Sony raised the price of its PS5 consoles twice over the past year, pushing the price of the regular PS5 from $499.99 all the way up to $649.99. […]

item.title: AI-driven cyber warfare reshapes global defense readiness
item.description: The Iran conflict is exposing how AI is transforming cyber warfare, and testing global defenses in real time.

item.title: Tesla Model 3 : 600 000 km plus tard, voici ce qu’il reste de la batterie
item.description: Un YouTubeur canadien a racheté la Tesla Model 3 affichant le plus gros kilométrage en vente en Amérique du Nord : 609 828 km, batterie d'origine. Verdict du test : un tiers de capacité en moins, mais la voiture roule encore.

item.title: Venom and Hot Peppers Offer a Key to Killing Resistant Bacteria
item.description: Researchers have developed three new antibiotics from scorpion venom and habanero peppers to combat tuberculosis and other drug-resistant pathogens.

item.title: The Fujifilm X-T5 is still my favorite APS-C camera years later, and that means the rumored X-T6 has a touch act to follow — here are 5 upgrades that would make it a worthy successor
item.description: How do you improve on a best-in-class camera? The rumored Fujifilm X-T6 has a tough act to follow, but with a new processor, sensor, improved autofocus and more, it could be a masterpiece

item.title: J’ai testé le casque Sony INZONE H6 Air : le confort à tout prix pour le gaming
item.description: La gamme INZONE de Sony accueille un nouveau casque filaire à destination des joueurs les plus exigeants : l’INZONE H6 Air. Au programme : conception ouverte et confort.

item.title: Nintendo is raising Switch 2 prices as chip crisis bites
item.description: It sold 19.86 million Switch 2s last year but forecasts a drop in sales next year.

item.title: Why Confidential AI is the next big thing for enterprise
item.description: Confidential AI is becoming mandatory for enterprise security and compliance beyond model performance.

item.title: Instructure hackers claim they stole data from nearly 9,000 schools
item.description: They also locked students out of Canvas and warned the company to negotiate with them by May 12.

item.title: What exactly is an AI voice agent? And why does it matter in enterprise communication?
item.description: AI voice agents go far beyond traditional IVR. Here's what they are, how they work in enterprise settings, and what to check before you deploy one.

item.title: Microsoft's rumored 'Low Latency Profile' CPU trick could make Windows 11's menus and apps load up to 70% faster
item.description: Want Windows 11's menus and apps to just work faster? Microsoft could be moving a key piece of the puzzle into place.

item.title: Nintendo is raising Switch 2 prices
item.description: Nintendo is raising the price of its Switch 2 console globally, "in light of changes in market conditions," and is now forecasting a drop in sales over the next year. Starting September 1st, the Switch 2 will cost $499.99 in the US, up from its current $449.99 price. At the same time, prices will also […]

item.title: Meet Rassvet, Russia’s Answer to Starlink
item.description: With the launch of the first 16 satellites, Russia begins construction of a network for satellite internet that aims to cover the entire country by 2030. But getting there won’t be easy.
